summary: Stage the retained source-built OpenSCAD WASM artifact only inside ephemeral verification runners while keeping public distribution quarantined behind Q-0033.

externalInputs.purpose: Reuse the retained official-source WASM build artifact already recorded in ENGINE_VERSION for ephemeral byte, parity, and production-static verification.

decisions.topic: Legally quarantined WASM verification in clean CI
decisions.decision: Download the exact retained source-build artifact from run 29529789154 into the ignored public engine path only inside the web, Linux production-static, and parity runners. A clean developer checkout skips the direct filesystem-byte test when the quarantined root is absent; hosted web CI stages the artifact first, so the byte and manifest assertions execute. Do not upload the staged web tree or add the engine bytes to Git.
decisions.rationale: Q-0033 blocks public distribution, not technical validation of the permitted official-source engine build. Clean hosted checkouts cannot validate or execute ignored bytes unless CI explicitly stages the recorded artifact. Ephemeral staging preserves the legal quarantine while keeping byte-integrity, runtime, and parity evidence real.

testEvidence.criterion: Clean hosted verification obtains the exact retained source-built WASM bytes without committing or publishing them.
testEvidence.test: Observe the first hosted candidate run, then exercise the static-asset and workflow contracts after adding ephemeral staging.

red.command: GitHub Actions CI run 29553179737, Web checks job 87799860653
red.outcome: RED: Web checks reached unit tests but three static-artifact assertions failed ENOENT because the legally ignored public/openscad-engine/2026.06.12 payload was absent from the clean checkout. Parity also failed before its result could distinguish missing WASM bytes from format parity.

green.outcome: FOCUSED GREEN / HOSTED REPLACEMENT PENDING: 2 files and 9 assertions passed. The contract requires the exact pinned download action, artifact name, run id, and ignored destination in web, Linux e2e, and parity jobs; local byte and manifest checks passed against the retained source-build bytes. A replacement hosted run must prove clean-runner download permissions and runtime behavior.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
